name: pythermodb-reference-maker
description: Create validated pyThermoDB reference YAML from thermodynamic tables, constants, matrix parameters, and equation correlations.

interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex workflow for converting thermodynamic tables, constants, matrix parameters, and equation correlations into validated pyThermoDB reference YAML with project-style templates and validation scripts.
defaultPrompt: Convert this thermodynamic table into pyThermoDB reference YAML.
Create a pyThermoDB equation table from this correlation.
